prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWC-GLOVEHOLDER-BLK Product Type: PROTECTIVE_GLOVE Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal Disposable Latex Glove Holder Duty Belt Hook Loop Closure EMT Supplies Description: The ASR Federal disposable glove holder was designed with quick and easy access in mind. Whether you’re in law enforcement, EMT or EMS services, having quick access to your medical gloves is essential in an emergency situation.

This glove pouch is made of sturdy black leather that is weather-resistant so you can count on it to keep your gloves safe and dry indoors or outdoors. It features a sturdy hook and loop closure that will open quickly and seal securely when not in use.

Each disposable glove holder comes with a duty belt attachment so you can easily attach it to your belt for custom comfort and quick deployment. Each pouch will hold a pair of standard disposable medical gloves.

This duty belt glove holder is proudly manufactured in the USA. It features reinforced stitching to ensure a long lifetime, and its slim and lightweight design is ideal for those who are often on the go. Search Terms: gloves disposable glove holder clip belt glove holder duty belt accessories duty belt key holder emt gear ems gloves ems bags belt keepers police duty belt emt duty belt ems duty belt badge holder belt clip emt belt emt essentials ems tools Features: - QUICK ACCESS TO GLOVES – The ASR Federal disposable glove holder was designed with quick and easy access in mind. Whether you’re in law enforcement, EMT or EMS services, having quick access to your medical gloves is essential in an emergency situation. - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION – This glove pouch is made of sturdy black leather that is weather-resistant so you can count on it to keep your gloves safe and dry indoors or outdoors. It features a sturdy hook and loop closure that will open quickly and seal securely when not in use. - DUTY BELT COMPATIBLE – Each disposable glove holder comes with a duty belt attachment so you can easily attach it to your belt custom comfort and quick deployment. Each pouch will hold a pair of standard disposable medical gloves. - MADE IN USA – This duty belt glove holder is proudly manufactured in the USA. It features reinforced stitching to ensure a long lifetime, and its slim and lightweight design is ideal for those who are often on the go. - SPECIFICATIONS – Dimensions: 4.5” x 4”; Color: plain black; Material: leather; Fits 1 pair of disposable gloves; Belt loop design; Made in the USA === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Federal Black Disposable Glove Holder Duty Belt

openai.item_name: ASR Federal Black Leather Glove Holder

anthropic.title_differentiation: Hook And Loop Closure, Leather Construction, EMT And EMS Gear, Made In USA, Belt Attachment

openai.title_differentiation: Quick Access, Duty Belt Loop, Hook And Loop Closure, Weather Resistant Leather, Holds 1 Pair, Made In USA
